data.content_ref: inline:{"analogy":{"adopted_commitment_refs":[],"disanalogies":["Attention planning operates on non-authoritative scratch, unlike formal state transitions","Coverage receipts are advisory, not adjudicative"],"overturn_conditions":["If conj.py is documented as intentionally attention-free, the coupling is wrong","If scratch attention is purely a model responsibility by design, the state fence is unnecessary"],"shared_structure":["Deterministic planning precedes bounded model call","State fence separates planning from dispatch","Coverage receipts are append-only and replayable"],"source_memory_refs":["731938a568fa4a6200024c0bcf743cf46f14b0ead5088c5e33ef1ac2c558d5b1","b5f7cb1f66a4325cbb69a9eaf559d87401852b207dd3fbb7bcb88b67ce358950"],"transfer_claims":["Just as the bridge freezes formal state before assembling evidence, attention planning should freeze scratch selection before conjecture dispatch"]},"claim":"The incorrectly prompt-delegated behaviour is that the conjecture operator (conj.py:43-84) accepts school conditioning but no scratch attention pack, meaning the model is expected to produce conjectures without deterministic attention selection and coverage receipts. The harness should own attention planning (scratch/attention.py:405-469) and inject the attention pack into the conjecture call's bounded context. The present failure is that attention selection and conjecture dispatch are not coupled through a typed interface, leaving the model to infer what scratch context is relevant. The strongest deterministic control architecture inserts a state fence between attention selection and conjecture dispatch: the harness deterministically plans attention, appends coverage receipts, then composes the conjecture pack with the selected scratch context. This preserves open-ended reasoning (C10) because the model still reasons freely over the provided context; it simply cannot self-select which scratch to attend to.","counterconditions":[{"case":"If conjecture is intentionally context-free to maximize model freedom, attention injection would reduce openness","eval":"observation"},{"case":"If scratch is always empty at conjecture time, the attention pack is vacuous","eval":"observation"},{"case":"If attention planning is already implicitly handled by the scheduler, an explicit pack would be redundant","eval":"observation"}],"definitions":[],"derivation":[],"formalization_refs":[],"mechanism":"Deterministic components: attention planner selects scratch blocks and emits coverage receipts at state fence (attention.py:405-469); conj.py receives attention pack as typed input and renders pack with selected context; harness appends coverage receipts before dispatch. Model-call components: conjecture model receives rendered pack with attention-selected context; model produces conjectures within bounded responsibility. Typed interfaces: AttentionPlan{scratch_refs, coverage_receipts} -> ConjecturePack{problem, attention_context, school_conditioning} -> ConjectureResult. Transition semantics: attention selection is a state fence (append-only); conjecture dispatch consumes the frozen attention plan; coverage receipts are committed before model call. Manifest/events/replay implications: attention events replay deterministically (harness.py:69-116); coverage receipts are part of scratch state, non-authoritative (C8); conjecture results are formal state. Evidence and security behaviour: attention selection is deterministic, no model influence; scratch provenance committed separately (bridge/harness.py:286-457). Migration: extend conj.py signature to accept attention pack; scheduler calls attention planner before conjecture dispatch; no change to model output contract. Retained open-ended freedom: model reasons over provided context without self-selecting attention. Strongest likely failure mode: attention planner selects empty or irrelevant scratch, degrading conjecture quality without any model recourse. Falsifying tests: assert conj.py receives non-empty attention pack when scratch exists; assert coverage receipts are appended before conjecture dispatch; assert replay produces identical attention selection; assert model output does not influence attention plan.","premises":[],"schema":"deepreason-reasoning-envelope-v1","scope":{"covers":[],"excludes":[]},"simulation_refs":[],"uncertainties":[]}
